channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-6859] osd_declare_object_destroy()) ASSERTION( inode )
item.description:
Met this during 24 hours failover test on OpenSFS cluster.

<4>Lustre: 9261:0:(client.c:2018:ptlrpc_expire_one_request()) Skipped 2 previous similar messages
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) header@ffff880f5e0793c0[0x0, 4, [0x2c0000404:0x28a4:0x0] hash]{
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) ....mdt@ffff880f5e079410mdt-object@ffff880f5e0793c0(flags=0, writecount=0)
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) ....mdd@ffff880f5ceae7d0mdd-object@ffff880f5ceae7d0(open_count=0, valid=0, cltime=0, flags=0)
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) ....lod@ffff880f5c5d9740lod-object@ffff880f5c5d9740
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) ....osd-ldiskfs@ffff880f5b8ba2c0osd-ldiskfs-object@ffff880f5b8ba2c0(i:(null):0/0)[plain]
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) } header@ffff880f5e0793c0
<3>
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4205:osd_object_find()) lu_object does not exists [0x2c0000404:0x28a4:0x0]
<3>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:4352:osd_index_ea_insert()) lustre-MDT0003-osd: Can not find object [0x2c0000404:0x28a4:0x0]6809092:1606929732: rc = -2
<0>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:2310:osd_declare_object_destroy()) ASSERTION( inode ) failed:
<0>LustreError: 12426:0:(osd_handler.c:2310:osd_declare_object_destroy()) LBUG
<4>Pid: 12426, comm: tgt_recov
<4>
<4>Call Trace:
<4> [<ffffffffa0506875>] libcfs_debug_dumpstack+0x55/0x80 [libcfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa0506e77>] lbug_with_loc+0x47/0xb0 [libcfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa0d81d93>] osd_declare_object_destroy+0x293/0x2d0 [osd_ldiskfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa08f6f5d>] out_destroy_add_exec+0x6d/0x250 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0904044>] update_recovery_exec+0xaf4/0x1d20 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0906a69>] distribute_txn_replay_handle+0x249/0xfb0 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0512c01>] ? libcfs_debug_msg+0x41/0x50 [libcfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa083c663>] ? target_recovery_overseer+0x93/0x320 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0843404>] target_recovery_thread+0x924/0x2300 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0842ae0>] ? target_recovery_thread+0x0/0x2300 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffff8109abf6>] kthread+0x96/0xa0
<4> [<ffffffff8100c20a>] child_rip+0xa/0x20
<4> [<ffffffff8109ab60>] ? kthread+0x0/0xa0
<4> [<ffffffff8100c200>] ? child_rip+0x0/0x20
<4>
<0>Kernel panic - not syncing: LBUG
<4>Pid: 12426, comm: tgt_recov Not tainted 2.6.32-431.29.2.el6_lustre.g2382eb0.x86_64 #1
<4>Call Trace:
<4> [<ffffffff81528fdc>] ? panic+0xa7/0x16f
<4> [<ffffffffa0506ecb>] ? lbug_with_loc+0x9b/0xb0 [libcfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa0d81d93>] ? osd_declare_object_destroy+0x293/0x2d0 [osd_ldiskfs]
<4> [<ffffffffa08f6f5d>] ? out_destroy_add_exec+0x6d/0x250 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0904044>] ? update_recovery_exec+0xaf4/0x1d20 [ptlrpc]
<4> [<ffffffffa0906a69>] ? distribute_txn_replay_handle+0x249/0xfb0 [ptlrpc]

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: This is actually duplicate with LU-6840
It seems this is because batchid and master transno is not updated correctly during the recovery, which cause some updates are executed twice or missing. I will cook a patch.
